message:
Add virtual scrolling component for large result sets

VirtualList component provides O(1) scroll positioning for rendering
only visible items in search results and conversation messages. Enables
smooth navigation through 10K+ results without memory exhaustion.

Features:
- Fixed-height VirtualList for search results
- Variable-height VariableHeightVirtualList for conversation messages
- Configurable overscan for smooth scrolling
- Scroll-to-index support for deep linking
- Memory-efficient item recycling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
